title: Midnight-craving British Jam Stir-fry
description: A light and bitter dish featuring jam and ricotta cheese, cooked with a sauté method suitable for low-fat dishes.
instructions: Combine jam and ricotta cheese in a mixing bowl.
Add minced garlic, thyme leaves, and salt to the mixture. Mix well until combined.
Pour oil into a non-stick skillet or wok over medium heat. Add garlic and cook for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Carefully pour jam and ricotta cheese mixture into the skillet. Stir-fry gently for about 2-3 minutes, allowing the ingredients to meld together evenly.
Transfer the stir-fried dish onto a serving plate. Serve hot or at room temperature.
